description_long: This handcart features a classic, open carriage design with a deep, rectangular compartment bordered by raised side panels and a slightly flared front and rear. The body is predominantly black with gold trim accentuating the edges, giving it a vintage, elegant appearance. Four large, spoked wooden wheels with a weathered texture support the cart, attached to the lower frame. Two long, straight handles extend from the front, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, suitable for carrying goods or passengers. The overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden frame with metallic reinforcements at the joints and wheel hubs.
description: A vintage-style black and gold handcart with four large spoked wheels, raised side panels, and long front handles. The open compartment is spacious and bordered by decorative trim.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open compartment, raised side panels, and both pairs of large spoked wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two long handles and the width of the cart, with the wheels visible on either side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the open compartment and wheel arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the alignment of the wheels.
